title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India:
Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jubilant FoodWorks Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
